item.title: A message from Mme. Perron:
item.description: Any Europe Team Student with outstanding 50/50 tickets are asked to please drop them off in room 125 following announcements. A reminder that March 6th is the last day to place Charcuterie Board orders. Please see Mme Perron or a Europe Student if interested.

item.title: A message from Mme. Bourdon:
item.description: Beavertail Day is Coming to STA! Starting tomorrow, Wednesday, March 3rd, Mme Bourdon will be selling tickets for a delicious treat you won’t want to miss! On Tuesday, March 10th, the Bytown Beavertails mobile truck will be rolling into STA during both lunch periods to serve up warm, sweet goodness! Classic Beavertails are $10 each, made fresh and served at lunch. Mme Bourdon will visit each Grade 7/8 class in the morning to collect orders. High School students can grab their tickets during their lunch hour. Tickets are on sale from tomorrow to Friday. Don’t miss your chance to enjoy this tasty winter treat
